'''savumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reaccentuation|reaccentuation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reaccentuation|reaccentuation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| savumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sævimith|sævimith]] || [[word:sævimij|sævimij]] || [[word:sævimish|sævimish]] || [[word:sævimi|sævimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:savuvumuth|savuvumuth]] || [[word:savuvumuj|savuvumuj]] || [[word:savuvumush|savuvumush]] || [[word:savuvumu|savuvumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:savumuth|savumuth]] || [[word:savumuj|savumuj]] || [[word:savumush|savumush]] || [[word:savumu|savumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:savufmuth|savufmuth]] || [[word:savufmuj|savufmuj]] || [[word:savufmush|savufmush]] || [[word:savufmuf|savufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:savumuthu|savumuthu]] || [[word:savumuju|savumuju]] || [[word:savumushu|savumushu]] || [[word:savumuku|savumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:savumuth|savumuth]] || [[word:savumuj|savumuj]] || [[word:savumush|savumush]] || [[word:savumu|savumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:savumuthul|savumuthul]] || [[word:savumujul|savumujul]] || [[word:savumushul|savumushul]] || [[word:savumukul|savumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:savumuthuthu|savumuthuthu]] || [[word:savumujuju|savumujuju]] || [[word:savumushushu|savumushushu]] || [[word:savumuku|savumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:savumuthun|savumuthun]] || [[word:savumujun|savumujun]] || [[word:savumushun|savumushun]] || [[word:savumukun|savumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:savumuthuoro|savumuthuoro]] || [[word:savumujuoro|savumujuoro]] || [[word:savumushuoro|savumushuoro]] || [[word:savumukuoro|savumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
